children.heading: Federal Deposit Insurance Act; temporary increase in deposit insurance
children.label: a Federal Deposit Insurance Act; temporary increase in deposit insurance

children.heading: Increased amount
children.label: 1 Increased amount
children.text: Effective only during the period beginning on , and ending on , section 11(a)(1)(E) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act () shall apply with “$250,000” substituted for “$100,000”.October 3, 2008December 31, 201312 U.S.C. 1821(a)(1)(E)

children.heading: Borrowing limits temporarily lifted
children.label: 2 Borrowing limits temporarily lifted
children.text: During the period beginning on , and ending on , the Board of Directors of the Corporation may request from the Secretary, and the Secretary shall approve, a loan or loans in an amount or amounts necessary to carry out this subsection, without regard to the limitations on such borrowing under section 14(a) and 15(c) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act (, 1825(c)).October 3, 2008December 31, 201312 U.S.C. 1824(a)

children.heading: Federal Credit Union Act; temporary increase in share insurance
children.label: b Federal Credit Union Act; temporary increase in share insurance

children.heading: Increased amount
children.label: 1 Increased amount
children.text: Effective only during the period beginning on , and ending on , section 207(k)(5) of the Federal Credit Union Act () shall apply with “$250,000” substituted for “$100,000”.October 3, 2008December 31, 2013112 U.S.C. 1787(k)(5)See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Borrowing limits temporarily lifted
children.label: 2 Borrowing limits temporarily lifted
children.text: During the period beginning on , and ending on , the National Credit Union Administration Board may request from the Secretary, and the Secretary shall approve, a loan or loans in an amount or amounts necessary to carry out this subsection, without regard to the limitations on such borrowing under section 203(d)(1) of the Federal Credit Union Act ().October 3, 2008December 31, 201312 U.S.C. 1783(d)(1)

children.heading: Not for use in inflation adjustments
children.label: c Not for use in inflation adjustments
children.text: The temporary increase in the standard maximum deposit insurance amount made under this section shall not be used to make any inflation adjustment under section 11(a)(1)(F) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act () for purposes of that Act [ et seq.] or the Federal Credit Union Act [ et seq.].12 U.S.C. 1821(a)(1)(F)12 U.S.C. 181112 U.S.C. 1751
